chooser.title: Select Library Mode
chooser.subtitle: Choose how you want to browse your media library in this session.
chooser.sfwDesc: Browse your general movies, TV shows, and cast lists.
chooser.nsfwDesc: Browse adult content library, specialized collections, and stars.

addPeople.modalDescription: Activate or search for people to add to the library.
addPeople.adultModalDescription: Activate or search for adult people to add to the library.
addPeople.noInactive: All discovered people are already in your library.
addPeople.noInactiveDesc: Scan and organize new movies or TV shows to find more cast and crew suggestions.
addPeople.adultNoInactive: All discovered adult people are already in your library.
addPeople.adultNoInactiveDesc: Scan and organize new adult titles to find more cast and creator suggestions.
addPeople.noSearchResultsDesc: No people in your local pack matched this search. Try another name.
addPeople.noFilterResultsDesc: Try clearing or relaxing the local people filters to see more suggestions.
addPeople.adultNoSearchResultsDesc: No adult people in your local pack matched this search. Try another name.
addPeople.adultNoFilterResultsDesc: Try clearing or relaxing the local adult people filters to see more suggestions.
addPeople.tmdbPlaceholder: TMDB search is not yet implemented.
addPeople.bulkPlaceholder: Bulk add is not yet implemented.

movies.title: No Movies Found
movies.description: Your movies library is currently empty. Run a scan or add media in the organizer.

collections.title: No Collections Found
collections.description: Your collections library is currently empty. Group movies and series into custom collections.

series.title: No TV Shows Found
series.description: Your TV shows library is currently empty. Scan and match series in the organizer.

people.title: No People Found
people.description: No directors, actors, or writers registered. Try scanning media to extract cast details.

adult.title: No Adult Content Found
adult.description: Your adult media library is empty. Ensure files are correctly matched and organized.

adult_series.title: No Adult TV Shows Found
adult_series.description: Your adult TV shows library is empty. Ensure files are correctly matched and organized.

adultPeople.title: No Adult Stars Found
adultPeople.description: No actors or creators from adult media have been registered yet.

adultCollections.title: No Adult Collections Found
adultCollections.description: Your adult collections library is currently empty. Group adult media into custom collections.

adultTags.title: No Adult Tags Created
adultTags.description: Organize your adult media with custom tags. You can add tags in the media details page.

tags.title: No Tags Created
tags.description: Organize your media with custom tags. You can add tags in the media details page.

search.title: No matching {tab} found
search.description: Try a different search term or check the spelling.

filter.title: Nothing fits these filters
filter.description: Try clearing or relaxing a few filters to bring {tab} back into view.

tags.emptyFocusTitle: This tag is ready to use.
tags.emptyFocusDescription: Add this tag to movies, shows, or people and they will appear here.
tags.modalDescription: Create a new custom tag for organizing your media.
tags.editModalDescription: Rename the tag or adjust its color.
tags.deleteModalDescription: Remove this tag from every tagged item.
tags.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}" and remove it from all tagged items?
tags.errorExists: A tag with this name already exists
